title: Joy Sutradhar In BUET Hackthon
description: This was my life's 1st hackathon, and im feeling very proud. More special thing is that this was Bangladesh's first Ai Hackathon organized by Cognisor AI at BUET This was amazing experience and i have learned new things about Actual Ai impact in real life, Team collaboration, Time management etc. From my Northern University Bangladesh team "Dream of X" secured 2nd runner-up position lead by Mahdin Islam Mukim, MD. HABIBULLAH SHARIF and Yousuf Abdullah vaia. Im very proud about that. impact_dhaka #Hackathon #Ai
